• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Análisis de enriquecimiento funcional

Francisco Manuel González Nuño

library(gprofiler2)
library(pathfindR)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(progeny)
library(pheatmap)
library(stringr)
library(msigdbr)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(enrichplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(ReactomePA)
library(ggrepel)

conflicted::conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")

1 GSEA

de <- read.csv("../Results/DE_pseudobulk.csv") 
MSI_DF <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens")
hallmarks <- MSI_DF %>% 
  filter(gs_collection == "H") %>%
  dplyr::select(gs_name, gene_symbol)
de2 <- de[!duplicated(de$gene_name),]
stats_datos_MNL <- de2$logFC_Metastasis.Nodo.Linfático
names(stats_datos_MNL) <- de2$gene_name
stats_datos_MNL <- sort(stats_datos_MNL,
                        decreasing = TRUE)
gsea_res_MNL <- GSEA(
  geneList = stats_datos_MNL,
  TERM2GENE = hallmarks,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  verbose = T,
  by = "fgsea"
)
pathways <- gsea_res_MNL@result %>% filter(pvalue < 0.1) %>% pull(ID)

for(p in 1:length(pathways)){
print(pathways[p])
 g <- gseaplot2(gsea_res_MNL, 
                geneSetID = pathways[p], 
                title = pathways[p], 
                pvalue_table = TRUE, 
                pvalue_table_columns = c("pvalue", "p.adjust"), 
                pvalue_table_rownames = "")
 print(g)
}
## [1] "HALLMARK_APICAL_SURFACE"

## [1] "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE"

## [1] "HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE"

2 Metástasis de nodo linfático

df_NL <- c(
  readRDS("../Results/splsda_selected_genes_TPMNL.rds")$gene,
  de %>%
    filter(FDR_Metastasis.Nodo.Linfático < 0.05) %>%
    pull(gene_name)
  ) %>% unique()
background_symbols <- unique(de$gene_name)

2.1 GO BP

go_bp_NL <- enrichGO(
  gene = df_NL,
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  universe = background_symbols,
  keyType = "SYMBOL",
  ont = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  qvalueCutoff = 1
)
clusterProfiler::dotplot(go_bp_NL, showCategory = 15) + ggtitle("GO Biological Process Enrichment")

2.2 KEGG

# convertimes SYMBOL a ENTREZID
entrez_list_NL <- bitr(
  df_NL,# %>% filter(pvalue_MetastasisNodoLinfático_vs_TumorPrimario < 0.05) %>% pull(gene_name),
  fromType = "SYMBOL",
  toType = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db
)
background_symbols_entrez <- unique(
  bitr(
    background_symbols,
    fromType = "SYMBOL",
    toType = "ENTREZID",
    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db
)$ENTREZID)

# KEGG
kegg_res_NL <- enrichKEGG(
  gene = entrez_list_NL$ENTREZID,
  organism = "hsa",
  universe = background_symbols_entrez,
  keyType = "kegg",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  qvalueCutoff = 1
)
clusterProfiler::dotplot(kegg_res_NL, showCategory = 15) + ggtitle("KEGG Pathways")

reactome_res_NL <- enrichPathway(
  gene = entrez_list_NL$ENTREZID,
  organism = "human",
  universe = background_symbols_entrez,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.15,
  qvalueCutoff = 0.15,
  readable = TRUE
)
ReactomePA::dotplot(reactome_res_NL, showCategory = 15
                    #, colorBy = 'pvalue'
                    ) + ggtitle("Reactome")

3 Tumor primario vs Colon Normal

df_CN <- c(
  readRDS("../Results/splsda_selected_genes_TPCN.rds")$gene,
  de %>%
    filter(FDR_Colon.Normal < 0.05) %>%
    pull(gene_name)
) %>% unique()

3.1 GO BP

go_bp_CN <- enrichGO(
  gene = df_CN,
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keyType = "SYMBOL",
  ont = "BP",
  universe = background_symbols,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
  qvalueCutoff = 0.1
)
clusterProfiler::dotplot(go_bp_CN, showCategory = 15) + ggtitle("GO Biological Process Enrichment")

3.2 KEGG

# convertimes SYMBOL a ENTREZID
entrez_list_CN <- bitr(
  df_CN,
  fromType = "SYMBOL",
  toType = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db
)

# KEGG
kegg_res_CN <- enrichKEGG(
  gene = entrez_list_CN$ENTREZID,
  organism = "hsa",
  universe = background_symbols_entrez,
  keyType = "kegg",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
  qvalueCutoff = 0.1
)
clusterProfiler::dotplot(kegg_res_CN, showCategory = 15) + ggtitle("KEGG Pathways")

reactome_res_CN <- enrichPathway(
  gene = entrez_list_CN$ENTREZID,
  organism = "human",
  universe = background_symbols_entrez,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
  qvalueCutoff = 0.1,
  readable = TRUE
)
ReactomePA::dotplot(reactome_res_CN, showCategory = 15
                    #, colorBy = 'pvalue'
                    ) + ggtitle("Reactome")
